sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8316" key="a)necio/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεξ-ιόομαι</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἰός</etym>) <sense id="n8316.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be reduced to a metallic state,</tr_> Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.153B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.153B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
